title: Aeroplanes
content:
A genius who once did aspire
     To invent an aerial flyer,
        When asked, "Does it go?"
        Replied, "I don't know;
     I'm awaiting some damphule to try 'er."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Aeroplanes", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
